Description: THE TEAM HAVE ARRIVED AT @TEMPUR_UK 😆
STARTING OFF WITH A WARM WELCOME FROM THE TEAM🛍️
SAFE TO SAY @TEMPUR_UK KNOW HOW TO HOST…
WE TOOK MATTRESS TESTING VERY SERIOUSLY…
WE CAN’T WAIT TO SHARE ALL THAT WE’VE LEARNT! 🧠 KEEP YOUR EYES PEELED…IN THE MEANTIME, SHOP TEMPUR NOW
Can you guess where we are?  We’ll be here tomorrow morning with a special surprise…..

North East followers listen up!

After shooting our Summer Sale campaign in the beautiful Saltburn by the Sea last week (and getting an amazing reaction from the locals), we’re returning today to give a little something back!

Find us by the Seaview Restaurant today 10AM-12PM where we’ll be handing out free accessory goody bags and gifts, plus your chance to win a stunning Orla Kiely sofa. 

Just look our for the Barker and Stonehouse van!

We're working on something new 
and we want to hear from you! 

What are your biggest design 
dilemmas or styling challenges?
Today, team Barker and Stonehouse took part in the famous Knaresborough Bed Race, raising money for @jennyruthworkshops
Putting the 'stone house' in Barker and Stonehouse!
The day started with a fancy dress parade through the streets of Knaresborough
Then the race itself, complete with a plunge in the River Nidd!
Well done team Barker and Stonehouse! We’re proud to be part of such an amazing community event 🙌
10 DAYS LEFT TO SCAN🤳🏼
